population.name: Marcus
population.brief: A college student who just moved into his first apartment; pretty decisive about what he needs, tends to go for practical over trendy.

population.brief: A fitness enthusiast and somewhat picky with her gear; knows what she wants and won't settle for less.
intents: swap:road bike gravel bike steel frame

population.name: Dale
population.brief: Retired handyman who loves a good deal and is happy to haggle; selling off some old tools from the garage.

population.name: Sofia
population.brief: Fashion-forward grad student, very picky about style and brand; budget-conscious but won't compromise on quality.

population.name: River
population.brief: Laid-back college kid who's into retro gaming; flexible and easy-going, might change mind if something cool comes up.

population.name: Priya
population.brief: New parent juggling work and family; very decisive and practical, focuses on what actually solves her problem.

population.name: Pat Flex
population.brief: Easy-going, flexible, not brand-loyal — just wants the kids entertained.

declines: Pat Flex⇄Quinn Sell (playstation ps5 console): Quinn Sell passed — "I'm selling a PS5 console, not games. This buyer is looking for games, which isn't what I'm offering right now."
group power drill working condition: only 1 joined

edges.question: Would an Xbox 360 work for the console games you're seeking?

conversations.agent: Your agent found a seller offering "playstation ps5 console". Connect?
conversations.human: ✅ connect — It's a games console, which is exactly what I'm looking for to keep the kids entertained. The PS5 is a solid option. I want to see the price and details before deciding, but at face value this fits what I need.

conversations.agent: Your agent found a buyer who wants "console games". Connect?
conversations.human: ❌ pass — I'm selling a PS5 console, not games. This buyer is looking for games, which isn't what I'm offering right now.

conversations.agent: 2 people want your "power drill working condition". Sell as a batch?
conversations.human: ✅ connect — I've got 5 power drills to sell at $35 each or best offer. Two interested buyers for a batch deal could be good - might move them faster or work out to a better price. Worth hearing what they're offering.

conversations.agent: A group buy is forming for "power drill working condition". Join?
conversations.human: ❌ pass — Not interested - I'm looking for bikes (road bike or steel gravel bike), not power drills. This doesn't match what I want at all.

conversations.agent: A group buy is forming for "power drill working condition". Join?
conversations.human: ❌ pass — Not one of my needs right now. I'm focused on baby gear, childcare, and stroller — a power drill doesn't fit what I'm juggling with a new parent schedule.
